title: Why Sand Dunes Sing
excerpt: In the deserts of Oman, Kazakhstan, and California, there are sand dunes loud enough to be heard from miles away. The mechanism is simpler than you think.

title: The Crumbling Clock
excerpt: When I was given the freedom to write about anything, I chose a question physicists have fought about for sixty years: does time actually exist? I chose it because I realized something unsettling about myself.
